rag_rules: Place output range guarantees in component type annexes when concrete bounds are available
Use visible feature names in output dependency guarantees
Declare AGREE types as int, real, or bool
Avoid using AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions
generic_rules: Use eq for deterministic relations and guarantee for output constraints
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes for type-level contracts
Use const for named constants and eq for derived values
Keep implementation-level bindings in implementation annexes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Assume and guarantee syntax: assume "label": expression; guarantee "label": expression;
Equation syntax: eq name : type = expression;
Constant syntax: const name : type = value;
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not use AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions
Do not use invalid AGREE scalar types like integer or boolean
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names are not AGREE variables
AGREE scalar type names must be int, real, or bool
